'''Snrrrlagga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] who was employed by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|cartels]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After involving himself in affairs that would damage the career of [[Eugene Talmont]], he was [[Death/Legends|assassinated]] by a hired [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]].
